---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and where does LLM Workbench fall short today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. API sketches welcome.

## Scope check

LLM Workbench has deliberate non-goals (see [PROJECT.md](../../PROJECT.md) —
it is not a model provider, chat UI, eval harness, or routing layer). Briefly
note how this fits the project's scope.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one.
